summary: Iter30 Vision Systems verified end-to-end via PUBLIC ingress. 16/16 new public-ingress contract tests pass, 38/38 local iter30 tests pass, and cumulative iter27+iter28+iter29+iter30 = 98/98 pass (with PYTHONPATH=/app/backend for one server-import test). All P1 features (VisionDevice abstraction with 12 drivers, chunked video ingest, Vision Console health tile) confirmed against deployed backend.

minor.issue: Requires PYTHONPATH=/app/backend or cwd=/app/backend to resolve 'import server'. Pre-existing, not introduced by iter30. Passes when run correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: Video session stores chunks inline in Mongo doc — fine at 128MB cap but service comment already flags GridFS as the escape hatch if VISION_VIDEO_MAX_MB is raised. Good.
Chunk overflow check is against declared total_bytes AND absolute cap — both branches covered.
VideoStartRequest codec is Literal['mp4','webm','mov','raw']; callers using h264/avc will get 422. Consider documenting or relaxing to a broader set if downstream sources vary.
Response field for session id is 'id' (from VideoSession.id) — no explicit 'session_id' alias in start response. Chunk/complete accept 'session_id'. Slight asymmetry, but tolerable.
seed_data_creation: Test devices are TEST_-prefixed and cleaned up in-test via DELETE. No persistent seed left behind aside from a small number of video-session and frame docs from happy-path test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter30 shipped clean. Public URL: https://youthful-archimedes-7.preview.emergentagent.com. Use /app/backend/tests/test_iter30_public_ingress.py as regression harness. For cumulative iter27-30 local suite, run from /app/backend (or set PYTHONPATH=/app/backend) so tests/test_iter29_stabilization.py can `import server`.
test_credentials: n/a — endpoints under test are open.
